title: IIIT Hyderabad Asia Pacific Associates is Hiring: Subject Matter Expert (Junior)

jsonLd.title: IIIT Hyderabad Asia Pacific Associates is Hiring: Subject Matter Expert (Junior)
jsonLd.description:
IIIT Hyderabad Asia Pacific Associates, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Subject Matter Expert for our Allahabad operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About IIIT Hyderabad Asia Pacific Associates:
IIIT Hyderabad Asia Pacific Associates is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in Bloom's Taxonomy
• Proficiency in Content Creation
• Proficiency in IB Curriculum
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in Zoom/Teams
• Proficiency in Communication Skills

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Life and accident insurance
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Allahabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with IIIT Hyderabad Asia Pacific Associates!
